S.FORM: Rick Barry 3 bulad 28 demiad, 1944 a mihca, Rick Barry, miunduay.
S.PHON: *iʦk barrj * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, *iʦk barrj, miunduaj.
